bootstrap.unit: entity_id cluster; all six receptor/seed rows for a sampled control move together

claim_boundary: This is a protocol-regression bridge over repeated computational controls. It is not candidate evidence, binding, affinity, competition, Docking Gold, or experimental blocking truth, and it cannot alter the frozen V4-D teacher or prospective test.

continuous_score_contract.classification_policy: A/B/C/E and G tiers are diagnostic only and never a bridge hard gate.
continuous_score_contract.missing_policy: No imputation. Any missing, failed, non-pose-backed, or fewer-than-four-complete-model control job fails identity/completeness closure.

data_access_contract.aggregate_file_policy: Do not read campaign-wide job_results.tsv or pose_scores.tsv because they contain candidate values.
data_access_contract.raw_result_policy: Construct the exact control allowlist from each docking_jobs.tsv before opening results/<job_id>/job_result.json. Any candidate result path is forbidden.
data_access_contract.semantic_protocol_check: Canonical protocol semantics, receptor/restraint residue content, ATOM-only policy, HETATM zero gate, top-8 policy, seeds, and scoring implementation must match after excluding campaign IDs, paths, hashes, and publication metadata.

decision_policy.current_v4_d_effect: None. Legacy128 is never added to the frozen V4-D teacher, model selection, or prospective test.
decision_policy.future_use_if_fail: Keep legacy128 as an independent descriptive OOD campaign only.
decision_policy.future_use_if_pass: A new version may test legacy128 as low-weight OOD auxiliary data, but must report primary-only and primary-plus-legacy ablations.

implementation_freeze_contract.self_hash_policy: The freeze JSON does not contain its own SHA256. Its SHA256 is recorded in the adjacent external record and must also be copied into the deployment trust-root SHA256SUMS before production execution.

information_available_at_freeze.incidental_candidate_schema_inspection: One V4-D candidate raw job_result.json was opened to inspect the evidence schema. It was not a control, was not paired across campaigns, and its values were not used to choose bridge thresholds.
information_available_at_freeze.incidental_unpaired_control_schema_inspe: The header and first two legacy control rows of campaign-wide job_results.tsv were displayed while inspecting column layout. No corresponding V4-D control values were opened and no paired statistic was computed.
information_available_at_freeze.known_completion_only: Both campaigns report 282/282 control jobs successful.
information_available_at_freeze.known_identity_only: Both campaigns use the same frozen 47-control input file and the same score_pose.py bytes.
information_available_at_freeze.threshold_selection_policy: Thresholds were fixed from the 0-1 job-utility scale and the intended protocol-transfer use before paired control extraction.

objective: Determine whether the legacy V4-C dual128 campaign and the V4-D fullqc290 campaign share a sufficiently concordant continuous docking-geometry scale for future low-weight auxiliary training.

publication_contract.implementation_hash_timing: Freeze the production builder and tests before first paired score extraction.
publication_contract.output_set_policy: exactly the four required regular files; no extras and no symlinks
publication_contract.receipt_publication_order: last, after exact output-set and SHA256 verification

report_only_metric_definitions.bland_altman_right_minus_left: Mean primary_v4_d minus legacy_v4_c difference and mean plus or minus 1.96 times the sample standard deviation.
report_only_metric_definitions.gate_effect: None. These values are descriptive and cannot change PASS or FAIL.
report_only_metric_definitions.linear_regression_right_on_left: Ordinary least-squares primary_v4_d job utility as response and legacy_v4_c job utility as predictor; report slope and intercept.
report_only_metric_definitions.overall_pearson: Pearson correlation over all 282 paired job utilities.
report_only_metric_definitions.rmse: Square root of the mean squared primary_v4_d minus legacy_v4_c job-utility difference over all 282 pairs.

report_only_metrics: hotspot, occlusion, CDR3, clash, HADDOCK, and AIR channels

changes: Bind preregistration, builder, tests, and teacher utility in a pre-extraction implementation-freeze artifact.
Require lstat plus O_NOFOLLOW regular-file reads and reject symlinked control results or output files.
Require final byte revalidation of inputs, outputs, and receipt plus an exact four-file output set.
Use Python standard-library statistics only for Node23 portability.
Define Pearson, RMSE, OLS slope/intercept, and Bland-Altman outputs as report-only metrics.
revision.reason: Freeze the reviewed implementation and close file-safety, TOCTOU, exact-output-set, portability, and preregistered report-only metric gaps before any paired control values are extracted.
revision.timing: Before paired control extraction or production bridge execution.

revision.reason: Correct the disclosure of incidental schema inspection performed before threshold freeze.
revision.timing: Before paired control extraction, production bridge execution, or implementation freeze.
